description: Generate visual assets and PPTX for general users

context.theme: A futuristic but reliable AI Operating System called Kyberion. Blue and silver tones, clean and professional.

params.brief: A concept visual for Kyberion: A glowing brain with structured gear wheels, representing disciplined AI. Theme: {{theme}}

content.title: Kyberion: The Intent-Driven OS for AI

slides.title: 1. What is Kyberion?
slides.body: An Operating System that turns your intent into reality safely.

slides.title: 2. Say what you want
slides.body: Just type: 'Open the news' or 'Convert this PDF'. Kyberion does the rest.

slides.title: 3. Absolute Governance
slides.body: Every action is logged and verified. Safe for enterprise and personal use.

slides.title: 4. Your AI, Your Rules
slides.body: Tiered knowledge storage keeps your private data private.

slides.title: 5. Start Today
slides.body: Join the Kyberion ecosystem and unleash disciplined autonomy.
